extraction.one_line_summary: KONRAD Patrick soloed to victory after attacking 37km out, holding off chase group by over 1 minute while GC group finished 14 minutes back.
tactical_patterns: KONRAD attacked alone with 37km remaining, avoiding Saturday's error of letting MOLLEMA escape; high-risk solo succeeds when committing early.
VAN AERT drove pace in chase group but inexplicably sat up final kilometer, wasting domestique effort for no tactical gain.
POGAČAR sprinted against CARAPAZ at finish 14min down, psychological gamesmanship signaling strength despite stage being decided.
MATTHEWS and COBRELLI sprinted from 120-rider gruppetto for green jersey points, showing intermediate sprint tactics even in mountain stages matter.

rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: positive: executed 37km solo attack decisively after learning from previous breakaway failure, showing improved tactical maturity
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: drove chase pace effectively but sat up in final kilometer, unclear team directive or energy preservation
rider_signals.COBRELLI Sonny: positive: caught PÉRICHON on line from distance in gruppetto sprint, exceptional finishing speed despite mountain stage fatigue
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: sprinted playfully at finish 14min down, psychological dominance display suggesting complete GC control
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: matched POGAČAR sprint at finish, engaging in symbolic battle despite irrelevant time gaps
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: contested gruppetto sprint aggressively for green jersey points, calculated intermediate classification focus
